title: Entity Clarity Index (ECI) Dataset
description: Comprehensive ECI dataset covering 750+ entities across industries. Tracks AI posture, capability, and Entity Clarity Coefficient (ECC) scores for use with MCP-enabled research and analysis tools on exmxc.ai.

metadata.description: Dataset-level metadata for MCP context and provenance

industries.description: All industry verticals represented in this dataset

entity_types.description: All entity type classifications in this dataset

ecc_range.description: Observed ECC score range across all entities

company.description: Full legal or commonly recognized name of the entity

posture.description: AI engagement posture: Open = publicly engaged with AI; Defensive = cautious/restricted AI engagement; Blocked = no accessible AI surface or actively blocking

capability.description: Assessed AI capability level of the entity

ecc.description: Entity Clarity Coefficient — composite score (0–100) representing AI discoverability, posture signal strength, and capability alignment. 0 = Blocked/no signal.

entities.company: The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)
KAIST (Korea Advanced Institute of Science & Technology)
The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)
University of Science and Technology of China
Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH)
Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT)
